channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (189091 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 189091

🍴 Forks: 109456

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-29T05:24:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 nashsu/AutoCLI (2386 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/AutoCLI

📄 Descrizione: AutoCLI is a Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl), now powered by AutoCLI.ai .

⭐ Stelle: 2386

🍴 Forks: 228

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-24T03:04:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-22T03:57:21Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST (1035 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: therealaleph

📝 Repository: therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST

📄 Descrizione: Rust port of @masterking32's MasterHttpRelayVPN — all credit to @masterking32 for the original idea and Python implementation. Free DPI bypass via a Google Apps Script relay with TLS SNI concealment. CLI + cross-platform desktop UI, HTTP + SOCKS5 proxy, no runtime deps.

⭐ Stelle: 1035

🍴 Forks: 133

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: anti-censorship censorship-circumvention cross-platform desktop-app domain-fronting dpi-bypass egui google-apps-script gui http-proxy iran mitm proxy rust sni socks5 tls

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-21T14:46:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T04:47:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 therealaleph/sni-spoofing-rust (329 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: therealaleph

📝 Repository: therealaleph/sni-spoofing-rust

📄 Descrizione: DPI bypass via fake TLS ClientHello injection with wrong TCP sequence number. Rust port of @patterniha's SNI-Spoofing. Linux, macOS, Windows. Works with v2ray/xray VLESS configs behind Cloudflare.

⭐ Stelle: 329

🍴 Forks: 35

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: censorship-circumvention cloudflare dpi-bypass proxy rust sni-spoofing tcp v2ray vless xray

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T22:39:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-29T18:12:39Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
